text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have my perfect timetable and hours of
dedicated training to thank for this success.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Flawless plans naturally bring upon success. I'm
glad I believed in this idea and devoted myself to
it.
choice_data_list: Let's set our sights even higher.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wish to begin building a schedule for my next
race without delay.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will prove once again that with a perfect plan
comes yet another victory!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Indeed. We cannot rest on our laurels just yet.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This victory is but a checkpoint en route to an
even greater goal...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I intend to work even harder from now on to
maintain my winning streak.
